hero.title: Fire Safety Management & Assessment
hero.subtitle: End-to-end fire safety for commercial, industrial and residential premises — including high-rise buildings (HRBs).
hero.description: Kirk & Kirk are accredited fire risk professionals on the National Fire Risk Assessment Register (NFRAR). We deliver fire risk assessments, fire strategies, physical fire safety surveys and the policies, procedures and emergency plans that keep your people safe and your buildings legally compliant.

overview.heading: Our Fire Safety Services
overview.description: From the first risk assessment to ongoing maintenance of fire extinguishers and doors, we provide a complete fire safety service for commercial, industrial and residential buildings — including high-rise buildings (HRBs) — under the Regulatory Reform (Fire Safety) Order 2005 and the Building Safety Act.

features.title: Fire Risk Assessments
features.description: Fire risk assessments for commercial, industrial and residential buildings, including high-rise buildings (HRBs), carried out by NFRAR-accredited assessors.

features.title: Fire Strategies
features.description: Bespoke fire strategies for commercial, industrial and residential buildings including HRBs — from new-build design review to existing-building upgrades.

features.title: Fire Extinguishers
features.description: Installation, inspection and maintenance of fire extinguishers to keep your portable firefighting equipment compliant and ready to use.

features.title: Fire Door Surveys
features.description: Detailed fire door surveys and inspections to verify integrity, certification and suitability against current fire safety legislation.

features.title: Fire Compartmentation
features.description: Fire compartmentation surveys and inspections to confirm your building's passive fire protection is intact and performing as designed.

features.title: Emergency Plans & PEEPs
features.description: Fire emergency plans including Personal Emergency Evacuation Plans (PEEPs) so every occupant — including those needing assistance — can evacuate safely.

features.title: Fire Policies & Procedures
features.description: Site-specific fire policies and fire procedures that support your duty holder obligations and sit neatly alongside your wider HSEQ documentation.

features.title: DSEAR Assessments
features.description: Dangerous Substances and Explosive Atmospheres Regulations 2002 (DSEAR) assessments for sites handling flammable liquids, gases, dusts or other energetic materials — hazardous-area classification, ignition-source control and protective measures.

sectors.heading: Who We Support
sectors.description: We support duty holders across the built environment. If any of the following apply, a fire risk assessment is a legal requirement under the Regulatory Reform (Fire Safety) Order 2005.

steps.title: Site Visit
steps.description: Our NFRAR-accredited fire risk assessors visit your property to inspect fire hazards, ignition sources, structural protection, detection systems, compartmentation and means of escape.

steps.title: Assessment & Analysis
steps.description: We evaluate the risks against the people present, assessing which hazards can be reduced, controlled or eradicated to bring your premises into compliance.

steps.title: Report & Action Plan
steps.description: You receive a comprehensive Fire Safety Risk Assessment with a clear, prioritised action plan for any improvements required to meet your legal obligations.

cta.heading: Book Your Assessment
cta.description: Our NFRAR-accredited fire risk assessors are ready to help you comply with your legal duties and protect your premises. Don't wait for an incident or enforcement notice.
